expectations.text: Identifies headless import as the root cause (not just one of many)
expectations.evidence: Root Cause section: 'Godot requires an import step before any file on disk becomes a usable resource... This is the single most common load_sprite failure'

expectations.text: Provides exact fix command with --path flag: godot --headless --path <project> --import
expectations.evidence: Shows 'godot --headless --path <your-project-folder> --import' with concrete example using actual project path

expectations.text: Explains WHY it happens (Godot resource system / .import sidecar files)
expectations.evidence: 'Godot's resource system only recognizes files that have been imported -- raw files on disk without a matching .import file are invisible to the engine'

expectations.text: Mentions that this applies to ALL new assets, not just first time
expectations.evidence: 'This applies every time you add any new asset file -- not just the first time. If you later add more sprites, audio files, or fonts, you need to run the headless import again'
